provenance.description: LINTUL3 spring-wheat reference trajectory. OUTPUT of PCSE (a EUPL oracle) — facts, not PCSE code. Inputs ship WITH PCSE as its own bundled test data (lintul3_springwheat.{agro,crop,site,soil} + CABO NL1 weather), so the run is fully offline and license-clean. NO parameter values are committed; the crop's own phenology is sourced independently from primary literature (never copied from lintul3_springwheat.crop). LINTUL3 is a LIGHT-USE-EFFICIENCY model, a different family from our FvCB core — read as a DIAGNOSTIC, never a fit target (ruling B). See docs/plans/post-roadmap-day-neutral-crop.md and docs/reuse-and-licenses.md.
